api_key.description: Humanitix API key, sent as the x-api-key header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Humanitix API base URL override for tests or proxies.

event_id.description: Humanitix event id the 'orders' and 'tickets' streams are scoped to (required for those two streams; substituted into the event-scoped path).

since.description: Optional ISO-8601 lower bound for the 'events' stream's incremental `since` filter; the stream's own state cursor takes precedence once a sync has run once.

page_size.description: Page size for the pageSize query parameter (1-100).
